text: The Triborough bridge and tunnel authority shall establish and collect central business district tolls, fees and other charges as provided in subdivision twelve-a of Public Authorities Law § 553 (Powers of the authority) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 44
##### § 1705 — Disposition of revenue and penalties

The Triborough bridge and tunnel authority shall establish and collect central business district tolls, fees and other charges as provided in subdivision twelve-a of Public Authorities Law § 553 (Powers of the authority) .

*Last modified: Apr. 19, 2019*
